description: Unified skill point system. A single pool of points is shared across skill allocations, attribute allocations, element allocations, and weapon allocations.

skill_points.source: Granted by the Guide upon completing objectives, defeating bosses, or discovering new areas.
skill_points.note: Same points spent on attributes, elements, skills, and weapons. Strategic choice: specialize or diversify.

attributes.name: Fe
attributes.effect: +5% parry bonus, +3% status resistance per point

attributes.name: Suerte
attributes.effect: +3% crit chance, +2% drop rate per point

weapon_scaling.description: Weapons modify attributes directly via temp_offsets. A weapon with attack_power: +0.15 adds 15% to the caster's attack power.
